item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts SG Finserve Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 543.75
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 543.75 on 21 Apr 2026, SG Finserve Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 28.33% gain over the past year and outpacing the Sensex’s marginal decline of 0.19%. This milestone reflects a strong price momentum supported by a confluence of technical indicators across multiple timeframes. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Nestle India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 1347.9
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 1347.9 on 21 Apr 2026, Nestle India Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, propelled by a confluence of bullish technical indicators and sustained price momentum over the past week. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Nestle India Ltd Surges 4.14% to Day's High of Rs 1340.4 — Outperforms FMCG Sector by 3.48 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.96% on 21 Apr 2026, yet Nestle India Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 4.14% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1340.4. This 3.48 percentage-point outperformance over the FMCG sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific momentum rather than a mere market tailwind. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. to 52-Week High of Rs 135
item.description: With every major technical indicator aligned to the upside, The Jammu & Kashmir Bank Ltd. surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 135 on 21 Apr 2026, marking a significant milestone in its price momentum over the past year. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Suditi Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 101
item.description: Surging past its previous peak, Suditi Industries Ltd touched a fresh 52-week high of Rs 101 on 21 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 143% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a strong technical backdrop and robust price momentum that has propelled the stock well above key moving averages. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: SG Finserve Ltd Surges 7.27% to Day's High of Rs 535.3 — Outperforms Sector by 6.68 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex climbed 0.95% on 21 Apr 2026, yet SG Finserve Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.27% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 535.3. This 6.68-percentage-point outperformance over its NBFC sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Swiggy Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Swiggy Ltd, a prominent player in the E-Retail and E-Commerce sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a modest 1.42% gain in the stock price, the underlying data reveals a complex interplay of bullish and bearish bets as traders recalibrate their outlook on this mid-cap stock. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Hitachi Energy India Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Hitachi Energy India Ltd (POWERINDIA) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock recently hit a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 30,400, supported by strong volume and positive price action, reflecting growing investor confidence in this mid-cap heavy electrical equipment player. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: 360 ONE WAM Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: 360 ONE WAM Ltd (symbol: 360ONE) has witnessed a significant 17.06% surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. This increase accompanies a steady price performance aligned with sector trends, suggesting evolving directional bets among traders in the capital markets space. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Nippon Life India Asset Management Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: Nippon Life India Asset Management Ltd (NAM-INDIA) has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock hit a fresh 52-week and all-time high of Rs 1,055 on 21 Apr 2026, outperforming its sector and broader indices, while open interest rose by 11.16% to 8,169 contracts, reflecting increased investor positioning ahead of anticipated price movements. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: AU Small Finance Bank Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Momentum
item.description: AU Small Finance Bank Ltd (AUBANK) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock’s recent price action, coupled with rising volumes and improved technical positioning, suggests growing investor confidence in this mid-cap banking stock. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Phoenix Mills Ltd. Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Bullish Market Momentum
item.description: Phoenix Mills Ltd., a prominent player in the Realty sector, has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock outperformed its sector peers and broader indices on 20 Apr 2026, reflecting growing investor confidence amid improving technical and fundamental indicators. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Godrej Properties Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Godrej Properties Ltd (GODREJPROP) has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite a strong five-day rally and outperformance against its sector, the stock remains under pressure from a recent downgrade, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish momentum and cautious sentiment among traders. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Surge in Open Interest Signals Shifting Market Sentiment for Sammaan Capital Ltd
item.description: Sammaan Capital Ltd, a small-cap player in the housing finance sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling a potential shift in market positioning and investor sentiment. Despite the stock underperforming its sector and broader indices, the sharp increase in OI alongside rising volumes suggests active directional bets and evolving market dynamics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Universus Photo Imagings Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 424.4, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Universus Photo Imagings Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 20 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Vaishali Pharma Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 17.16% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 9.30, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Vaishali Pharma Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 20% on 21 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Surge in Open Interest Signals Shifting Market Sentiment for Nestle India Ltd
item.description: Nestle India Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest in its derivatives segment, reflecting heightened market activity and evolving positioning among traders. This development comes amid a steady price rally and improving technical indicators, suggesting a nuanced shift in investor sentiment within the FMCG sector. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Niraj Ispat Industries Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 5.0% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 232.85, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Niraj Ispat Industries Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 5.0% on 21 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Balaxi Pharmaceuticals Ltd Locks at Upper Circuit With 4.99% Gain — Buyers Queue, Sellers Absent
item.description: At Rs 28.00, the buying was done — not because demand dried up, but because the exchange wouldn't let the stock go any higher. Balaxi Pharmaceuticals Ltd locked at its upper circuit of 4.99% on 21 Apr 2026, with buyers queuing and no sellers willing to part with shares. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Siemens Ltd Sees Sharp Open Interest Surge Amidst Sustained Price Gains
item.description: Siemens Ltd., a heavyweight in the Heavy Electrical Equipment sector, has witnessed a notable surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling increased market participation and potential directional bets. The stock recently hit a new 52-week high of Rs 3,787, supported by sustained gains over the past three sessions and a positive shift in investor sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago
